T0175.title: Data Euphemism
T0175.definition: In illegal data trading, a slang term for "data" used on public social platforms like Tieba to evade content censorship.
T0175.description: In illegal data trading, a slang term for "data" used on public social platforms like Tieba to evade content censorship.
T0175.usageExample: "Selling various first-hand fruit, complete customer info—full refund if a single entry doesn’t match."
